---
title: "The Rev. Gordon Bolles Wickham"
---

## The Rev. Gordon Bolles Wickham

**Dates:** (1850-1920)

### Description

Vicar of Crookham cum Ewshott, and later of Bradford Abbas

### Biography

The son of the Rev. Frederic Wickham, second master of Winchester College, and Emily Eliza Gordon, he was appointed Vicar of Crookham, the parish where Mary Anne Dyson lived, in June 1875. He married (1887) Sidney Katherine Kerr.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 25 [1897?]
- Letter from April 6, 1875

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
